page_title: Fullmetal Alchemist: The Revenge of Scar
text:
Fullmetal Alchemist: The Revenge of Scar is a sequel to the 2017 film Fullmetal Alchemist. It later got a sequel of its own to conclude the story, Fullmetal Alchemist: Final Transmutation.
